name: agent-relay
description: Real-time agent-to-agent communication system for CLI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor)
author: khaliqgant

packages.name: choosing-swarm-patterns
packages.description: Use when coordinating multiple AI agents and need to pick the right orchestration pattern - covers 10 patterns (fan-out, pipeline, hub-spoke, consensus, mesh, handoff, cascade, dag, debate, hierarchical) with decision framework and reflection protocol

packages.name: adding-swarm-patterns
packages.description: Use when implementing custom swarm coordination patterns for multi-agent systems - covers pattern design, implementation strategies, and integration with existing agent orchestration

packages.name: writing-agent-relay-workflows
packages.description: Use when building multi-agent workflows with the relay broker-sdk - covers the WorkflowBuilder API, DAG step dependencies, agent definitions, step output chaining via {{steps.X.output}}, verification gates, dedicated channels, swarm patterns, error handling, and event listeners

packages.name: using-agent-relay
packages.description: Use when coordinating multiple AI agents in real-time - provides inter-agent messaging via Relaycast MCP tools with channels, threads, reactions, search, and webhooks

packages.name: running-headless-orchestrator
packages.description: Use when an agent needs to self-bootstrap agent-relay and autonomously manage a team of workers - covers infrastructure startup, agent spawning, lifecycle monitoring, and team coordination without human intervention

packages.name: agent-relay-snippet
packages.description: AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md snippet for agents on how to use agent-relay

packages.name: agent-relay-protocol
packages.description: Internal protocol snippet with session persistence, continuity, and trajectory tracking for dashboard integration

packages.name: shadow-agents
packages.description: Shadow agent profiles for code review, session auditing, and active monitoring - assign to spawned agents for oversight

packages.name: agent-policy-snippet
packages.description: Agent policy rules snippet - informs agents of spawn, messaging, and tool restrictions

packages.name: lead-agent
packages.description: Coordinator agent for multi-agent teams - delegates tasks, makes decisions, tracks progress without implementing

collections.name: Agent Relay Skills
collections.description: Core skills for multi-agent coordination — swarm patterns, workflow building, relay usage, and headless orchestration

For autonomous orchestration without human intervention

OpenCode plugin with native tools, idle polling, and worker spawning
Gemini CLI extension with MCP server, lifecycle hooks, and commands
